posts.author: hardik_shah1
posts.community: Greaves Cotton - Is this up to investors?
posts.text: Just look at the quality of products of the top 4-5 companies and the next rung. The bet should be on who wins when EV becomes the preferred choice. Just like ICE, where there are 4 players at the mass market and another 3 at the Premium end, same would happen in EVs ( Here the mass market would mean Ather, TVS and Bajaj and premium being ultraviolette etc.
